description: Nikita Bier discusses the challenges and strategies in building consumer apps within the Solana ecosystem, emphasizing the importance of targeting niche communities and the volatility of the consumer app market.
topic_summary: In this session, Nikita Bier shares insights on developing consumer apps on Solana, highlighting the need for a focused approach, the significance of design, and the necessity of making informed decisions during product development. Key points include the importance of identifying target audiences [t=39:74], the volatility of the market [t=94:35], and the value of early design investment [t=201:26].
